'''âr-ng-th''' ('''karangath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moe|moe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moe|moe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-ng-th
|-
! Lemma
| karangath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirangath|thirangath]] || [[word:jirangath|jirangath]] || [[word:shirangath|shirangath]] || [[word:kirangath|kirangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurangath|thuthurangath]] || [[word:jujurangath|jujurangath]] || [[word:shushurangath|shushurangath]] || [[word:kukurangath|kukurangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurangath|thurangath]] || [[word:jurangath|jurangath]] || [[word:shurangath|shurangath]] || [[word:kurangath|kurangath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurangath|thurangath]] || [[word:jurangath|jurangath]] || [[word:shurangath|shurangath]] || [[word:kurangath|kurangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therangath|therangath]] || [[word:jerangath|jerangath]] || [[word:sherangath|sherangath]] || [[word:kerangath|kerangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorangath|thothorangath]] || [[word:jojorangath|jojorangath]] || [[word:shoshorangath|shoshorangath]] || [[word:kokorangath|kokorangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorangath|thorangath]] || [[word:jorangath|jorangath]] || [[word:shorangath|shorangath]] || [[word:korangath|korangath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorangath|thorangath]] || [[word:jorangath|jorangath]] || [[word:shorangath|shorangath]] || [[word:korangath|korangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrangath|thĂŠrangath]] || [[word:jĂŠrangath|jĂŠrangath]] || [[word:shĂŠrangath|shĂŠrangath]] || [[word:kĂŠrangath|kĂŠrangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharangath|thatharangath]] || [[word:jajarangath|jajarangath]] || [[word:shasharangath|shasharangath]] || [[word:kakarangath|kakarangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharangath|tharangath]] || [[word:jarangath|jarangath]] || [[word:sharangath|sharangath]] || [[word:karangath|karangath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharangath|tharangath]] || [[word:jarangath|jarangath]] || [[word:sharangath|sharangath]] || [[word:karangath|karangath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharangath|sharangath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharangath|gosharangath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharangath|gokisharangath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharangathnĂŒ|sharangathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharangathnknĂŒ|gosharangathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangathnĂŒ|gokisharangathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharangathshĂ«|sharangathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharangathnkshĂ«|gosharangathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharangathshĂ«|gokisharangathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangathro|sharangathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangathnkro|gosharangathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangathro|gokisharangathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangathmu|sharangathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangathnkmu|gosharangathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangathmu|gokisharangathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharangathsher|sharangathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharangathnksher|gosharangathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharangathsher|gokisharangathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharangathng|sharangathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharangathnkng|gosharangathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharangathng|gokisharangathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharangathya|sharangathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharangathnkya|gosharangathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharangathya|gokisharangathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharangathyam|sharangathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharangathnkyam|gosharangathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharangathyam|gokisharangathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangathnĂŒshĂ«|sharangathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangathnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharangathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangathnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharangathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangathnĂŒro|sharangathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangathnknĂŒro|gosharangathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangathnĂŒro|gokisharangathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangathnĂŒmu|sharangathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangathnknĂŒmu|gosharangathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangathnĂŒmu|gokisharangathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangathshĂ«nĂŒ|sharangathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharangathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharangathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangathshĂ«ro|sharangathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangathnkshĂ«ro|gosharangathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangathshĂ«ro|gokisharangathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangathshĂ«mu|sharangathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangathnkshĂ«mu|gosharangathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangathshĂ«mu|gokisharangathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangathronĂŒ|sharangathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangathnkronĂŒ|gosharangathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangathronĂŒ|gokisharangathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangathroshĂ«|sharangathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangathnkroshĂ«|gosharangathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangathroshĂ«|gokisharangathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangathromu|sharangathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangathnkromu|gosharangathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangathromu|gokisharangathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangathmunĂŒ|sharangathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangathnkmunĂŒ|gosharangathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangathmunĂŒ|gokisharangathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangathmushĂ«|sharangathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangathnkmushĂ«|gosharangathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangathmushĂ«|gokisharangathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangathmuro|sharangathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangathnkmuro|gosharangathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangathmuro|gokisharangathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
